name: RoboSats Exp.
subtitle: Sideload RoboSats Exp. directly on your device

apps.name: RoboSats Exp.
apps.subtitle: Peer-to-peer Bitcoin wallet
apps.localizedDescription:
RoboSats is a peer-to-peer Bitcoin wallet with built-in Tor routing.

Features:
• Privacy-first P2P trading
• Built-in Tor (Arti) for coordinator traffic
• Encrypted trade chat via Nostr
• Open source (AGPLv3)

versions.localizedDescription:
RoboSats Exp. 0.1.3-alpha.1
Orderbook filter, coordinator UX, native live updates, and trade reconciliation improvements.
* [Android universal APK](https://github.com/TempleOfSats/Robosats-Experimental/releases/download/v0.1.3-alpha.1/robosats-exp-0.1.3-alpha.1-universal.apk)
* [iOS unsigned IPA](https://github.com/TempleOfSats/Robosats-Experimental/releases/download/v0.1.3-alpha.1/robosats-exp-0.1.3-alpha.1-unsigned.ipa)
* [Linux AppImage](https://github.com/TempleOfSats/Robosats-Experimental/releases/download/v0.1.3-alpha.1/RoboSats.Exp_0.1.3-alpha.1_amd64.AppImage)
* [Windows installer](https://github.com/TempleOfSats/Robosats-Experimental/releases/download/v0.1.3-alpha.1/RoboSats.Exp_0.1.3-alpha.1_x64-setup.exe)
* [macOS DMG](https://github.com/TempleOfSats/Robosats-Experimental/releases/download/v0.1.3-alpha.1/RoboSats.Exp_0.1.3-alpha.1_aarch64.dmg)
Detached signatures and checksums are available in the release assets.
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v0.1.3-alpha.1 -->
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/TempleOfSats/Robosats-Experimental/commits/v0.1.3-alpha.1

versions.localizedDescription:
* Add live client onion link and demo GIF by @TempleOfSats in https://github.com/TempleOfSats/Robosats-Experimental/pull/10
* Fix iOS Xcode web bundle packaging and resource verification by @TempleOfSats in https://github.com/TempleOfSats/Robosats-Experimental/pull/12
* Fix robot identity preload by @TempleOfSats in https://github.com/TempleOfSats/Robosats-Experimental/pull/11
* Add manual mobile build workflow (Android + iOS) by @TempleOfSats in https://github.com/TempleOfSats/Robosats-Experimental/pull/13
* Add coordinator details view and token backup export by @TempleOfSats in https://github.com/TempleOfSats/Robosats-Experimental/pull/15
* Add AltStore/SideStore manifest for easy sideloading by @TempleOfSats in https://github.com/TempleOfSats/Robosats-Experimental/pull/14
* @TempleOfSats made their first contribution in https://github.com/TempleOfSats/Robosats-Experimental/pull/10
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/TempleOfSats/Robosats-Experimental/compare/v0.1.0-alpha.1...v0.1.0-alpha.2
